title: Opendoor Technologies (OPEN) Stock Price and Analyst Ratings 2026
text: Opendoor Technologies (NASDAQ: OPEN) stock has had mixed performance in recent quarters. The consensus rating from Wall Street analysts is Hold with an average price target of $2.36 to $6.00, depending on the analyst. Out of 15 Wall Street analysts covering the stock, 1 rates it as Buy, 5 as Hold, and 3 as Sell, with a median price target of $1.60. Wall Street sentiment for OPEN remains cautious. However, there are conflicting views among analysts. The three most recent analyst ratings by Keefe, Bruyette & Woods, Zelman & Assoc, and Citigroup all lean bearish, with an average target near $1. Analyst price targets vary widely. Citigroup set an ultra-low target of $0.70, while Credit Suisse remains more optimistic with $7. The highest analyst price target is $8.00, the lowest forecast is $2.00. Macroeconomic factors, including rising interest rates and reduced consumer demand for housing, are creating an unfavorable environment that may hinder the company's growth prospects. The stock sentiment appears mixed, with bears and bulls having significantly different outlooks on Opendoor's future performance.
